---
title: "Option 2: Bristol"
---

## Basecamp

- **Location:** Bristol
- **Dates:** 25th - 27th Sept 2026

## The Itinerary

### Bristol Beer Bike

A 60-minute pedal-powered bar crawl through Bristol city centre — includes 4 beers each. Quiet and social, great start to the weekend.

- Official page: [Bristol Beer Bike](https://bristolbeerbike.com/product/ride-on-beerbike/)

<div class="video-embed">
<video controls style="width:100%;max-width:960px;border-radius:6px;">
  <source src="https://bristolbeerbike.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/hp_video.mp4" type="video/mp4">
  Your browser does not support the video tag. <a href="https://bristolbeerbike.com" target="_blank">Visit Bristol Beer Bike</a>.
</video>
</div>

---

### Cheddar Gorge Adventure Caving

An underground expedition through Gough's Cave system — crawling, climbing, and squeezing through chambers including the Letterbox and the Bottomless Pit. Suitable for all abilities.

- Official page: [Cheddar Gorge Adventure Caving](https://www.cheddargorge.co.uk/things-to-do/rocksport-activities/adventure-caving)

[![Cheddar Gorge Adventure Caving](https://media.umbraco.io/longleat-cheddar/bdgb5bdd/rocksport_hero2-min.png)](https://www.cheddargorge.co.uk/things-to-do/rocksport-activities/adventure-caving)

<div class="video-embed">
<iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/fCMa9QMZPYc" title="Cheddar Gorge Adventure Caving" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>

---

### Bedlam Paintball — Absolute Bedlam

Equipment hire plus 500 paintballs per person. Purpose-built game zones, film-like scenarios, Bristol venue.

- **Time slot:** 10:00am – 1:00pm
- Official page: [Bedlam Paintball](https://bedlampaintball.co.uk/venue/bristol/)

[![Bedlam Paintball](https://bedlampaintball.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/Bedlam-Paintaball-Man-Mask-centered-2.jpg)](https://bedlampaintball.co.uk/venue/bristol/)

---

### Accommodation: The Bristol Wing (2 nights)

2 × quadruple rooms with private bathrooms (2 singles and 3 bunk beds per room), sleeping 9 guests across both rooms.

- Official page: [The Bristol Wing on Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/gb/the-bristol-wing-bristol.en-gb.html)

---

## Getting Around

Cheddar Gorge is the only out-of-town leg. Caving slots are at **12:30pm or 3pm** and last ~90 mins, leaving enough time to drive back, shower, grab food, and head out for the Beer Bike at 8pm. That makes the **3pm caving slot into a natural Saturday flow** — paintball in the morning, caving in the afternoon, food and Beer Bike in the evening. The Friday night option is still available if the group wants to kick things off on arrival.

### Suggested Weekend Flow

#### Option A — Beer Bike on Friday night

| Time | Activity | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| **Fri 8–9pm** | Beer Bike | Arrive, drop bags, straight out |
| **Sat 10am–1pm** | Bedlam Paintball | Morning session |
| **Sat ~1:45pm** | Drive to Cheddar | ~45 min |
| **Sat 3pm** | Cheddar Gorge Adventure Caving | Done by ~4:30pm |
| **Sat ~5:30pm** | Drive back, freshen up | Back in Bristol |
| **Sat evening** | Food, bars | Free evening in the city |

#### Option B — Beer Bike on Saturday night *(recommended)*

| Time | Activity | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| **Fri evening** | Arrive, settle in, drinks | Easy start |
| **Sat 10am–1pm** | Bedlam Paintball | Morning session |
| **Sat ~1:45pm** | Drive to Cheddar | ~45 min |
| **Sat 3pm** | Cheddar Gorge Adventure Caving | Done by ~4:30pm |
| **Sat ~5:30pm** | Drive back, shower, food | Back in Bristol, freshen up and eat |
| **Sat 8–9pm** | Beer Bike | Perfect end to a full day |

---

### Distances

| Leg | From | To | Distance | Drive time |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|
| 1 | The Bristol Wing | Bedlam Paintball, Bristol | ~3 mi | ~10 min |
| 2 | Bedlam Paintball | Cheddar Gorge Caving, Cheddar | ~23 mi | ~45 min |
| 3 | Cheddar Gorge | The Bristol Wing | ~22 mi | ~40 min |
| 4 | The Bristol Wing | Beer Bike departure point | ~0.5 mi | walking |
| | | **Total driving** | **~48 mi** | **~1 h 35 min** |

> All driving can be split across a minibus or shared Ubers — no single driver commitment needed.

## Cost Breakdown

### Activity and stay costs (group of 9)

| Item | Group cost | Per person (9 pay) | Per person (8 pay, stag free) |
|---|---:|---:|---:|
| Beer Bike | £390.00 | £43.33 | £48.75 |
| Cheddar Gorge Caving | £255.00 | £28.33 | £31.88 |
| Paintball — Absolute Bedlam | £59.95 pp | £59.95 | £67.44 |
| Accommodation — Bristol Wing | £508.00 | £56.44 | £63.50 |
| **Total** | **£1,692.55** | **£188.06** | **£211.57** |

> Paintball is priced per person. The stag-not-paying figure redistributes the stag's £59.95 across the 8 paying guests.
